properties.titulo_evento: Canada eyes Turkey as a fellow mid-power ally in weapons development
properties.descricao: Canada looks for lessons in Turkey's effort to nurse a homegrown industrial ecosystem for making vital defense equipment, a senior Canadian official said.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian drone strike on empty Baltic fuel depot prompts top-level resignation – in Latvia
properties.descricao: A Ukrainian official said Russia is spoofing Ukraine's drones, diverting them to strike nearby Baltic nations instead of targets in Russia.

properties.titulo_evento: EU, UK sanction Russians over deportations of Ukrainian children
properties.descricao: Russian institutions and officials accused of systemic deportation and indoctrination of children during war on Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Rebranding Francafrique
properties.descricao: France is trying to rebrand itself during a summit with African heads of states in Kenya.

properties.titulo_evento: UK sanctions network accused of planning attacks for Iran
properties.descricao: Britain freezes assets and travel for those accused of laundering billions and plotting Iranian-backed hostile activity.

properties.descricao: Efforts between Washington and Tehran to reach an agreement continue to fall short, fuelling concerns of return to war.

properties.descricao: Iran says Tehran’s response to the latest US proposal to end the war was “not excessive."

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli killings in Lebanon rise: Is even the pretence of a ceasefire over?
properties.descricao: Israel and Hezbollah have increased their attacks on each other, despite official ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war effect: Why is Modi asking Indians to avoid foreign trips, gold?
properties.descricao: PM urges Indians to work from home and avoid foreign trips during the global energy crisis due to the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
properties.descricao: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

properties.titulo_evento: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
properties.descricao: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.

properties.descricao: A dissident in Tehran says she feels helpless and under immense psychological pressure.

properties.descricao: He said the austerity measures would reduce India's fuel use and help save foreign exchange.

properties.titulo_evento: From Messi to Mbappé: Argentina’s World Cup sticker obsession returns
properties.descricao: Thousands of football fans in Buenos Aires are gathering in parks and public squares to swap World Cup stickers ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

properties.titulo_evento: Macron dances to ‘Hakuna Matata’ during welcome ceremony in Kenya
properties.descricao: French President Emmanuel Macron was welcomed with music, dancing and performances in Nairobi ahead of the Africa-France summit.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran warns Europe against sending warships to Hormuz as US talks gap widens
properties.descricao: Tehran has warned Europe against the idea of sending warships to the key waterway, as it outlined a conditional proposal on uranium, sanctions relief and a Lebanon ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump to discuss Iran war and trade on first US presidential visit to China since 2017
properties.descricao: The US leader was expected to travel to China earlier this year, but his trip was postponed due to the Iran war. It marks the first visit by a US president to China since 2017.

properties.titulo_evento: UK Army parachutes onto remote Atlantic island over suspected hantavirus case
properties.descricao: The British military parachuted medics and emergency supplies into Tristan da Cunha after a resident was suspected of contracting hantavirus.

properties.titulo_evento: France arrests Tunisian suspected of planning 'jihad-inspired' attack in Paris
properties.descricao: French has arrested a 27-year-old Tunisian man suspected of planning attacks "inspired by jihadism", the anti-terror prosecutor's office said on Monday. A source said he was targeting a Paris museum and members of the Jewish community.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine and Russia fight on despite US-mediated ceasefire

properties.titulo_evento: EU approves new sanctions on Israeli settlers over West Bank violence
properties.descricao: The European Union on Monday approved new sanctions on Israeli settlers "guilty of supporting the extremist and violent colonisation of the West Bank", French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot said on social media. Israel called the sanctions “arbit...

properties.titulo_evento: 'I will make order': Macorn calls for silence at Africa summit

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump says ceasefire 'on life support'
properties.descricao: After rejecting Tehran's response to the US peace proposal, President Donald Trump warned that the ceasefire in the war with Iran was "on life support." Follow DW for the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: EU greenlights sanctions on Israeli West Bank settlers
properties.descricao: Long blocked by Hungary's former government, the punitive EU measures are aimed at "extremist" Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank. Israel has denounced the move as "arbitrary and political."

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: 1-in-6 retailers fear for future
properties.descricao: About one-in-12 German businesses worry about survival, with twice as many retailers jittery. Meanwhile in Stuttgart, five pro-Palestinian activists face trial over attacking an Israeli defense company site. Follow DW.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: EU sanctions Russians over 'systematic unlawful deportation' of children
properties.descricao: The EU is sanctioning 16 individuals and seven entities over alleged child abductions. The UK also issued fresh sanctions, and Germany's defense minister visited Kyiv amid a shaky ceasefire. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: What will happen to Iran's nuclear material?
properties.descricao: Iran is believed to have over 440 kilograms of enriched uranium, which could be turned into weapons-grade nuclear material. Despite Trump's pledge to get the "nuclear dust," Tehran has kept it out of US reach.

properties.titulo_evento: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer 'not walking away' after local election mauling
properties.descricao: Keir Starmer has said he takes "responsibility" for Labour's poor election performance, but also for putting matters right again. "I know I have my doubters and I know I need to prove them wrong, and I will," he said.

properties.titulo_evento: India news: Cut fuel use, gold buys and foreign trips, says Modi, as no end in sight to Iran war
properties.descricao: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is asking Indians to work from home more and make a series of changes in their consumption habits, including cutting down on foreign trips and buying gold jewelry.

properties.titulo_evento: Could German ex-leader really negotiate Ukraine peace?
properties.descricao: Former German chancellor Gerhard Schröder is a controversial — and some critics would even say, unserious — choice as a negotiator on the Ukraine war. He's long been criticized for being too close to Russia.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany: 'Ulm 5' on trial after attack on Israeli arms firm
properties.descricao: Five activists have gone on trial in Germany following a break-in at the Israeli arms company Elbit Systems in Ulm. Their lawyers intend to argue they were trying to obstruct a genocide.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine asks Europe to broker ‘airport ceasefire’ with Putin
properties.descricao: Ukraine’s foreign minister told POLITICO Moscow might consider a deal as fears Kyiv could strike its major airports grow.

properties.titulo_evento: First-Time Home Buyers Are Staying on the Sidelines as Costs Rise
properties.descricao: The effects of the war in Iran have raised mortgage rates and lowered consumer confidence, making it even harder for house hunters.

properties.titulo_evento: How the U.S. Is Trying to Ensure the Dollar’s Dominance During Economic Turmoil
properties.descricao: As the government has been devising plans to keep the dollar dominant, China has been making its own moves to increase global influence of the renminbi.

properties.titulo_evento: As Trump Heads to Beijing, China Is ‘Locked and Loaded’ for a Fight
properties.descricao: Beijing is signaling that it is ready for a trade showdown, and it is building up a legal arsenal in preparation.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Rise as Prospects for U.S.-Iran Peace Deal Fizzle
properties.descricao: Oil prices rose and stock futures ticked down as investors reacted after the two sides failed to agree on a U.S.-Iran peace deal.
